page_metadata.biotools__summary: The tool can be used to create custom matrices to describe transcription factor binding sites (TFBS), search for clusters of TFBS, and identify target genes. Free registration is required.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The tool can be used to create custom matrices to describe transcription factor binding sites (TFBS), search for clusters of TFBS, and identify target genes. Free registration is required.
